results.rendered_html:
sthūṇā [sthā-nak udaṃtādeśaḥ pṛṣo˚  Tv. ]
1 The post or pillar of a house.
2 A post or pillar in general; sthūṇānikhanananyāyena  Ś. B. 
3 An iron image or statue.
4 An anvil.
Comp.
— nikhanananyāya see under nyāya.
